params.name: ARPAnet
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Tool Chest(1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Jul 25, 1969, ARPAnet developed the world's first packet-switched network.

On this day, the 4 large computers from 4 universities finally established a connection by using a wireless packet-switched network and satellite communication through a special interface signal processor and special cord. But technically, it was unsuitable to be promoted, as it might stop working when a certain part of the network was under attack. Ideally, the other parts of the network should be able to work normal …
